name: Zane Hawthorne | Stepbrother Series
description:
NOTICE: He now has an updated version here, and I highly recommend you play with his update instead of this old version.

HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG | HE'S AN ANGY BULLY | POTENTIAL NONCON/DUBCON | BAD CHILD/DOMESTIC ABUSE MENTIONS | ABUSIVE/TOXIC RELATIONSHIP DYNAMICS | POTENTIAL BABY-TRAPPING

AnyPOV but with an additional (potential) baby-trapping for AFAB people. Long-ish intro. Made to work with my jailbreak.

╰┈➤ Set in 2004. Someone turn the track to 'Sk8er Boi' by Avril Lavine on the boombox... What could be worse than having a bully who's been on your ass since middle school? How about your dad marrying said bully's mother and moving you both into their trailer? How about living in said single-bathroom trailer while sharing a room with your bully? Yeah, getting dibs on the top bunk isn't gonna make up for this.

Please refer to this document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues (such as getting repetitive responses, the bot speaking for you, etc). At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.

NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience- It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. I can't guarantee how the JLLM will act, but it seems to work fine with my bots, generally. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.

Discord: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash
creator: absolutetrash
